name: Priya
observedShift: Priya shipped a major feature on Monday and the team noticed, but she has been quieter this week. I want to check whether this is normal post-launch recovery or something unresolved. She also mentioned wanting to mentor a few months ago and that thread never moved. I need a clearer read on what she expects to own next quarter before I introduce the billing rewrite, since she may already be forming plans that this will disrupt.

focusPoints.label: What she expects to own next quarter
focusPoints.reason: Whether her next-quarter plan is already forming and how much it could be disrupted by the billing rewrite, so you can align before you introduce it.

focusPoints.label: Whether her quieter week is normal
focusPoints.reason: Priya shipped a major feature Monday and the team noticed, but she’s been quieter this week; one possibility is post-launch recovery, or there may be something unresolved worth clarifying.

focusPoints.label: Mentoring plans that stalled — what she needs
focusPoints.reason: How they're framing mentoring ownership and what support or decisions are still missing, since she previously wanted to mentor and that thread never moved.

focusPoints.label: Recognition and leverage from the launch
focusPoints.reason: What they want to be known for after a major ship, and whether the impact and visibility from this launch are translating into the leverage they want next.

issues: listenFor may lack observable behavioural cue: "whether she brings up a named person, team, or situation whe…"
